variants: Shakara Juma currently resides in Noblepine Downs, where she plays a pivotal role at Oaken Wheel Games. Originally from Marigold Fold, she was drawn to game design early on. Shakara earned her degree in Game Design from Goldspire University, which laid the foundation for her impressive career in the industry. Her dedication and talent did not go unnoticed, as she received the Amber Chalice Distinction, honoring her significant contributions to gaming.

With roots in Marigold Fold, Shakara Juma has carved out a successful career as a game designer at Oaken Wheel Games. She graduated from Goldspire University, where she nurtured her passion for creating engaging gaming experiences. Now living in Noblepine Downs, Shakara's work has earned her recognition, culminating in the prestigious Amber Chalice Distinction, a testament to her impactful presence in the gaming world.
